svg.title: kollab session lifecycle sequence diagram
svg.desc: Sequence diagram: goal submission, parallel fan-out, turn alternation with verdict parsing, convergence, mid-stream halt, directive injection, and resume.
svg.text: ↻ repeat per turn: build prompt → stream → parse verdict → broadcast · until Codex AGREE or round limit
resume prefix + directive injected · interrupted turn not in agent prompt · turn id stable
